objective.title: Uplink Split
objective.detail: Stabilize the west uplink terminal to reopen the center lane. Terminal 1 of 2.

interactables.label: Terminal A
interactables.hint: Stabilize the west uplink terminal to reopen the center lane.

interactables.label: Terminal B
interactables.hint: Sync the east uplink terminal to arm the central extraction lane.

extraction.hint: Collapse back to mid and hold for pickup.

mutator.name: Volatile Supply
mutator.description: Enemies shoot faster, but drops and caches pay more.
